templates.title: Professional Email - Day Off Request
templates.prompt: Write a professional email to your manager requesting a day off next Friday for a medical appointment. Include a subject line, greeting, reason, and sign-off.

templates.title: Formal Letter - Complaint
templates.prompt: Write a formal complaint letter to a company about a defective product you purchased. Include the product name, issue, and what resolution you expect.

templates.title: Short Report - Weekly Summary
templates.prompt: Write a short weekly report summarizing 3 tasks you completed this week, 1 challenge you faced, and your plan for next week.

templates.title: Dialogue - Job Interview
templates.prompt: Write a short dialogue between a job interviewer and a candidate. The interviewer asks about the candidate's strengths and experience. Include at least 6 exchanges.

templates.title: Short Article - Benefits of Reading
templates.prompt: Write a short article about the benefits of reading books. Include an engaging introduction, at least 3 benefits with explanations, and a conclusion.

templates.title: Opinion Essay - Technology in Education
templates.prompt: Write an opinion essay on whether technology improves or hinders education. Take a clear stance, provide at least 2 supporting arguments, address a counterargument, and conclude with your final thoughts.
